channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Throwback Thursday #84: Scared of Elevators!
item.description:
I am terrified of elevators.
I’m going to start taking steps to avoid them.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260521-1641.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: I am terrified of elevators.
item.dadjokefix:punchline: I’m going to start taking steps to avoid them.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
I am terrified of elevators. I’m going to start taking steps to avoid them. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjoke #dadjokes #dadjokefix #aigenerated #syntheticmedia #onelinerjoke #cleancomedy #humor #foryoupage #elevators #stairs #buildings
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
I am terrified of elevators.
I’m going to start taking steps to avoid them. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.
🤖 Hank is an AI character. Voice, face and animation are all generated. . . . #dadjoke #dadjokes #dadjokefix #aigenerated #syntheticmedia #onelinerjoke #cleancomedy #humor #foryoupage #elevators #stairs #buildings
item.dadjokefix:youtube_caption:
I am terrified of elevators.
I’m going to start taking steps to avoid them.
---

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #83: Alien Lullaby
item.description:
How do you get a baby alien to sleep?
You rocket.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260520-2338.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #82: Dracula's Mix-Up!
item.description:
Why did Dracula lie in the wrong coffin?
He made a grave mistake.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #81: Wanna learn banana splits?
item.description:
Where do you learn to make banana splits?
At sundae school.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260520-1657.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #80: How many apples on a tree?
item.description:
How many apples grow on a tree?
All of them!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #79: Bigfoot's Camping Trip!

It got in tents.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #77: Pavlov's Pampered...?
item.description:

Because he conditioned it.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #76: Angry Surgeon!
item.description:
What happens when you anger a brain surgeon?
They will give you a piece of your mind.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Sunday Funday #74: A climber's kid got a rocky name!

item.title: Sunday Funday #73: What do bees do after they wed?

They go on a honeymoon.

item.title: Sunday Funday #72: Money in the Freezer?!
item.description:

He wanted cold hard cash!

item.dadjokefix:youtube_caption:
Why did the man put his money in the freezer?
He wanted cold hard cash!

item.title: Joke Court Friday #67: A Puzzling Interruption!
item.description:

It's chewy!
